description: GIVEN a user is playing an SLIVE/FLIVE stream

steps.action: WHEN the scrubber bar is displayed
steps.result:
THEN the video title is displayed left justified above the scrubber bar
AND an ellipsis (...) is displayed at the end of the title if the title contains more than 30 characters
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue when watching at the live point
AND the scrubber bar is blue on the left side of the playhead when watching behind the live point
AND the scrubber bar grey on the right side of the playhead when watching behind the live point
AND there is a gradient behind the scrubber
AND the playback marker is at the current playback position during playback and pause
AND the user’s current playback position time is represented below the scrubber on the right hand side (H:MM:SS time format)
AND the closed captions button displays right justified above the scrubber bar
AND a "Watch Live" button displays to the right of the closed captions button if the user is watching behind the live point
